DBZ Unlimited: Look
 

LOOK: Since there are so Few DBZ Manga galleries on the web that I could count the ones I've come across on my left hand, I decided to be a somewhat "nonconformist." Instead of posting the usual recycled images found on the web I scanned a few images from my manga comic. If you'd like to use the images in this gallery on another site, go right ahead. Thats what they are here for.

I'm a strong believer in using thumbnails when making a display of images. I really hate it when I click on an image link only to find that its something I didn't want to see in the first place. At least this way you'll get a preview of what you're going to see before you download the image. The selection is limited, but scanning images is certainly not my idea of fun. Its small, but its home.
